arts.ttl: Preview: Leeds United vs. Millwall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's FA Cup clash between Leeds United and Millwall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke blasts “worst possible” development as Leeds United prepare for Millwall
arts.sum: Leeds United face Millwall this Saturday in the FA Cup Fourth Round looking to progress to the Fifth Round for the third successive season. Attention this week turns to the FA Cup, though, with Leeds facing league rivals Millwall at Elland Road on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Leeds United forward ruled out as Daniel Farke confirms squad rotation plan for Millwall
arts.sum: Leeds United will field a heavily rotated side for their FA Cup fourth round clash at home to Millwall on Saturday, Daniel Farke has confirmed. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Lucas Radebe delivers strong message for Leeds United and their rivals
arts.sum: Leeds United icon Lucas Radebe has reacted to the 2-0 victory over Coventry City with a strong claim of the side’s promotion credentials. Lucas Radebe shares Leeds promotion verdict with latest win on the board

arts.ttl: 'Formidable' Leeds United wow national media as four-word chant at Coventry City speaks volumes
arts.sum: First-half strikes from Joel Piroe and Jayden Bogle helped Leeds stretch their advantage at the top of Championship to five points with a comfortable 2-0 victory over Coventry. Leeds United edged a step closer to realising their Premier League dream as they opened up a five point gap at the top of the Championship table on Wednesday night, thanks to a win over Coventry City.

arts.ttl: Leeds United tipped to sign £17m star deemed 'not good enough' for the Premier League
arts.sum: The 24-year-old has been earning rave reviews for the Russian club this season and his former coach Nikola Elich believes he is one of the best attacking midfielders in Europe at present. "The Italian and Spanish championships will suit Eduard’s playing style," he said via Leeds United News, "but I have big questions about England."

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke baffled at three Leeds United decisions the referee got wrong
arts.sum: Overall, Farke was happy with how his side performed, but he was unsurprisingly frustrated that Leeds didn’t come away from the game with a scoreline that better reflected the amount of chances they created. Daniel Farke not happy with refereeing decisions in Coventry v Leeds

arts.ttl: ‘The crazy thing about the transfer window…’ - Millwall boss Alex Neil gives assessment on mid-season trading
arts.sum: “The crazy thing about the transfer window is that everybody does their work with two or three days left to go. Asked if he was pleased the window was now shut and whether the deadline should be different, Neil said: “The transfer window is the transfer window.
